channel.title: Chat on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Chat on Arrans github.io

item.title: RocketChat/Rocket.Chat
item.description: The communications platform that puts data protection first.

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

item.title: lobehub/lobe-chat
item.description: 🤯 Lobe Chat - an open-source, modern design AI chat framework. Supports multiple AI providers (OpenAI / Claude 4 / Gemini / DeepSeek / Ollama / Qwen), Knowledge Base (file upload / knowledge management / RAG ), Multi-Modal (Plugins / Artifacts / MCP) and thinking. One-click FREE deployment of your private ChatGPT/ Claude / DeepSeek application.

item.title: ngircd/ngircd
item.description: Free, portable and lightweight Internet Relay Chat server

item.title: deltachat/deltachat-desktop
item.description: Decentralized private messenger with chat-shared tools and games for Desktop

item.title: owncast/owncast
item.description: Take control over your live stream video by running it yourself. Streaming + chat out of the box.

item.title: Tyrrrz/DiscordChatExporter
item.description: Exports Discord chat logs to a file

item.title: simplex-chat/simplex-chat
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: flyerhq/flutter_chat_ui
item.description: Free and open-source chat SDK. Build fast, real-time apps and generative AI agents with a high-performance, customizable, cross-platform UI.

item.title: zulip/zulip
item.description: Zulip server and web application. Open-source team chat that helps teams stay productive and focused.

item.title: deltachat/deltachat-android
item.description: Decentralized private messenger with chat-shared tools and games for Android

item.title: 2noise/ChatTTS
item.description: A generative speech model for daily dialogue.

item.title: sindresorhus/caprine
item.description: Elegant Facebook Messenger desktop app

item.title: quackduck/devzat
item.description: The devs are over here at devzat, chat over SSH!

item.title: LemmyNet/lemmy
item.description: 🐀 A link aggregator and forum for the fediverse

item.title: keybase/client
item.description: Keybase Go Library, Client, Service, OS X, iOS, Android, Electron

item.title: tinode/chat
item.description: Instant messaging platform. Backend in Go. Clients: Swift iOS, Java Android, JS webapp, scriptable command line; chatbots

item.title: processone/ejabberd
item.description: Robust, Ubiquitous and Massively Scalable Messaging Platform (XMPP, MQTT, SIP Server)

item.title: fingerthief/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.

item.title: SebastienBtr/Dash-Chat-2
item.description: The most complete Chat UI for flutter. Easy to use, highly customizable and fully featured

item.title: movim/movim
item.description: Movim - Decentralized social platform

item.title: lollipopkit/flutter_gpt_box
item.description: GPTBox - a third-party client for OpenAI API.

item.title: SimformSolutionsPvtLtd/chatview
item.description: Highly customisable chat UI with reply and reaction functionality.

item.title: polyphony-chat/symfonia
item.description: A Polyphony chat server, compatible with Spacebar and the Discord API.

item.title: convos-chat/convos
item.description: Convos 👥 is the simplest way to use IRC in your browser

item.title: arran4/merge_chat_example
item.description: How chat should work. By merging.
